items.titolo: YouTube conquista gli Oscar, streaming esclusivo dal 2029

items.titolo: How much should you pay for a soundbar system? This Sony model is my new limit
items.descrizione: Sony's Bravia Theater System 6 may lack some of its pricier sibling's premium extras, but it still delivers impressive sound for most genres.

items.titolo: Micron outlines grim outlook for DRAM supply in first earnings call since killing Crucial memory and SSD brand — CEO says it can only meet half to two-thirds of demand
items.descrizione: Micron posted record revenues in its first earnings call since killing the consumer Crucial brand, though it admits that supply shortages will persist.

items.titolo: Sales of chip production equipment to reach $156 billion by 2027 — China, Taiwan, and Korea lead intense demand
items.descrizione: Driven by demand for AI and HPC accelerators, sales of chip production equipment are projected to increase through 2027. Asian countries are expected to lead the pack, according to SEMI.
